entry.title: lissy93 commented on an issue in dashy
entry.content:
lissy93 commented on lissy93/dashy#2217 · July 1, 2026 09:39
lissy93 commented Jul 1, 2026
Ah, that helps a LOT, thank you! Looks like Dashy isn't getting a JWT back from Authentik, but instead some JSON (hence the garbled decode). Is you…

Addition

Changes

Adds What Is My Tools (https://whatismytools.com) to Networking → Network Analysis, next to the existing Proxy Checker entry.

…

Adds 0xEsim to Virtual Phone Numbers #651

Adds 0xEsim to Communication > Virtual Phone Numbers.

0xEsim (https://0xesim.io) is a no-KYC eSIM covering 190+ countries. No
account, no ID and no…
